name: pf-finance
description: PersonalFi MCP Server — query and manage your personal finances via AI. Supports accounts, transactions, budgets, portfolio, goals, loans, subscriptions, and more.

read.name: get_account_balances
read.description: Return all account balances, types, and institutions

read.name: get_transactions
read.description: Fetch transactions with filters: account, category, date range, amount, search text

read.name: get_budget_summary
read.description: Budget limits vs actual spend per category for a given month

read.name: get_spending_trends
read.description: Monthly spending totals per category over a date range

read.name: get_portfolio_summary
read.description: Investment holdings, current values, unrealized gains/losses, asset allocation

read.name: get_net_worth
read.description: Total assets, liabilities, and net worth with a per-account breakdown

read.name: get_net_worth_trend
read.description: Historical net worth snapshots for trend analysis

read.name: get_categories
read.description: All transaction categories with type (income/expense/transfer)

read.name: get_loans
read.description: Loan balances, interest rates, minimum payments, and amortization schedule

read.name: get_goals
read.description: Savings goals with target amount, current balance, deadline, and progress %

read.name: get_recurring_transactions
read.description: Detected recurring bills and income with next occurrence estimate

read.name: get_income_statement
read.description: Income vs expense summary for a given period

read.name: get_transaction_rules
read.description: Auto-categorization rules (keyword → category mappings)

read.name: apply_rules_to_uncategorized
read.description: Run the rules engine against all uncategorized transactions

read.name: get_spotlight_items
read.description: Priority actionable alerts: over-budget categories, large transactions, upcoming bills

read.name: get_weekly_recap
read.description: 7-day spending summary with top categories and key transactions

read.name: get_financial_health_score
read.description: 0–100 health score with 6 components: savings rate, budget adherence, debt ratio, emergency fund, net worth trend, goal progress

read.name: get_spending_anomalies
read.description: Transactions that are statistical outliers vs the user's normal spending patterns

read.name: get_subscription_summary
read.description: Detected subscriptions with monthly cost, last charge date, and total annual cost

read.name: get_cash_flow_forecast
read.description: 30-day projected cash flow based on recurring income and expenses

read.name: search_transactions
read.description: Full-text search across transaction descriptions, payees, notes, and categories

write.name: add_transaction
write.description: Create a new manual transaction with amount, category, account, date, and notes

write.name: set_budget
write.description: Set or update a monthly budget limit for a given category

write.name: add_goal
write.description: Create a savings goal with name, target amount, target date, and linked account

write.name: add_snapshot
write.description: Record a net worth snapshot (used to populate the net worth trend chart)

write.name: categorize_transaction
write.description: Update the category of an existing transaction

write.name: add_account
write.description: Add a new account (bank, investment, loan, credit card, etc.)

security.description: The MCP server runs on the user's own machine or cloud instance. No third-party bank integrations. All data stays within the app. Requires the database to be unlocked (returns HTTP 423 if locked). Self-hosted mode uses SQLCipher AES-256 encryption.
security.transport_security: HTTP transport requires app to be running and authenticated. Stdio transport uses PF_PASSPHRASE environment variable.
